CONTENT.Career: On 3 January 2020, Chader signed a professional contract with Clermont. He made his professional debut with the club in a 1–0 Ligue 2 loss to Paris FC on 21 February 2020.On 13 July 2021, he joined Stade Lausanne Ouchy in Switzerland on loan for the 2021–22 season.On 11 August 2022, Chader returned to Switzerland and signed a three-year contract with Luzern.
CONTENT.Personal life: Born in France, Chader is of both Algerian and Moroccan descent.
CONTENT.External links: Clermont Foot ProfileSofyan Chader at Soccerway

SUMMARY: Sofyan Chader (born 12 May 2000) is a French professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Swiss club Luzern.
